line_width.description: Override maximum line width. Falls back to dprint global `line_width`.
line_width.title: Line Width

indent_width.description: Override indentation width. Falls back to dprint global `indent_width`.
indent_width.title: Indent Width

new_line.description: Override newline style. Falls back to dprint global `new_line`.

compact_balance_spacing.description: When true, removes empty lines between consecutive balance directives.
compact_balance_spacing.title: Compact Balance Spacing
